posts.text:
Happy Match Day! I’m wishing much luck and success to all our amazing medical students across New York and the country as they find out where they will train for residency. 
 
Doctors are the best of us, and that’s why I was so proud to get the largest expansion of residency slots back in 2021 with help from the great @RealDoctorMike, and continue to support the Resident Physician Shortage Reduction Act to add 14,000 residency training slots across the country. 
 
Good luck to all of you as you

This is pathetic. Clearly, they don’t want to defend what they know they can’t defend.
 
We need public hearings with Hegseth and Rubio under oath so the American people can get answers about the end game and the price they’re paying for Trump’s war.

MAGA Republicans want to make it harder to vote than to buy an AR-15.

They want Americans’ information run through an algorithm designed by Musk and DOGE that could kick eligible voters off the rolls.

They want to turn voter registration into a bureaucratic nightmare and limit how people can register.

That’s the SAVE Act, and that's why Democrats will fight it until the end.

With so many problems facing our country:

The cost-of-living sky high
People struggling to make ends meet
Gas prices out of control

Republicans are STILL choosing to spend their time on the SAVE Act to make it harder for American citizens to vote.

Senate Democrats will force a very simple vote to fully fund TSA.

America will see the matter crystal clear: which Senators WANT to pay TSA workers and end the chaos at our airports, and which Senators are going to BLOCK TSA funding yet again.

If the @SenateGOP want to open TSA, they must join Democrats and vote yes tomorrow.


Karoline Leavitt (@PressSec)

Democrats are intentionally disrupting Americans' travel with their reckless shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security.



— https:/

Eid Mubarak to the wonderful Muslim communities in New York and around the globe.
 
May you have a blessed Eid-al-Fitr with your friends and family.

Welcome home, Dylan.

Video

Americans are being forced to choose between life-saving medicine and everyday necessities, all while Trump requests $200 billion more for his war.
 
Remember, extending the ACA tax credits for more than 20 million Americans would have cost LESS THAN HALF of that.
 
This is Donald Trump’s America.

As we have all week, Democrats will continue to hold the floor to block the Republican voter suppression SAVE Act.
 
And as I’ve said all week: We will not let this bill pass under any circumstances, no matter how long it takes.

Last night we gave Republicans another chance to limit Trump’s unauthorized war in Iran. Once again, Republicans opposed our war powers resolution. Where is their courage? Where is their loyalty to the constitution? Where are the public hearings with Secretary Rubio and Hegseth under oath? 

This issue isn’t going away. Republicans can try to wash their hands of Donald Trump's war with Iran, but they will not escape responsibility.

You guessed it. Republicans objected a fifth time to paying TSA workers.


Chuck Schumer (@SenSchumer)

In a few minutes Democrats will be giving Republicans a FIFTH chance to pay TSA workers.

Will they finally fund TSA or once again object?



— https://nitter.net/SenSchumer/status/2034681308492771468#m

In four weeks, gas prices have surged by 27%—The second-largest jump in 35 years...

...and Donald Trump doesn't care:


FactPost (@factpostnews)

Trump on Iran: "I wanted to put out that fire and I said, 'You know, if I do that, oil prices will go up. The economy will go down a little bit.' I thought it would be worse, much worse actually. ... It's not that bad"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/factpostnews/status/2034666307719757923#m

For $200 billion we could lower health care premiums for tens of millions of Americans.

For $200 billion, we could educate a generation and unleash the immense potential of our students.

For $200 billion, we could cut hunger in this country in half.

For $200 billion, we could invest in jobs, in science, in manufacturing, and we could begin fixing our power grid.


The Washington Post (@washingtonpost)

Exclusive: The Pentagon asked the White House to approve a more than $200 billion request t

If Trump wants $200 billion, it means he believes we will be at war for a very, very long time.

That’s the last thing Americans want.

In a few minutes Democrats will be giving Republicans a FIFTH chance to pay TSA workers.

Will they finally fund TSA or once again object?

It was an honor to host the leadership of the West Bloomfield, Michigan Temple Israel in my office this week.

Their bravery, courage, resolve, and determination to ensure the security of the Jewish community in the face of last week’s terror attack is truly inspirational. We must continue to root out the scourge of antisemitism wherever it appears – there’s no better example of that than the fearless leaders of Temple Israel in West Bloomfield.

I will not be supporting Senator Mullin’s nomination to be the next Secretary of Homeland Security.

The problems at DHS, especially at ICE and CBP, run far deeper than just who is in charge.

Americans need a change in DHS POLICY. We demand legislation to rein in ICE and end the violence.

Trump started a war in the Middle East, but now he is trying to dodge the cost and leave the American people with the bill, and there are no signs this war is going to end anytime soon.

Secretary Rubio and Secretary Hegseth need to testify publicly under oath.

The American people deserve answers. They deserve accountability.

HAPPENING NOW: Senate Democrats will try AGAIN to pay our TSA workers amidst the Republican DHS shutdown.
 
Democrats will try to pass by unanimous consent – for the FOURTH time – a funding bill for TSA. Republicans have a simple choice: will they pay our critical workers and reduce wait times for flyers, or will they continue to block this funding?
